title: DigitalDragonSkin
description: The mod that gives the DigitalDragon his custom dragon player model.
body:
DigitalDragon's Skin Mod

This mod allows you to see DigitalDragon's Player Model!

The wings, tail, and snout will only apply to the DigitalDragon, this can't be customized. ![DigitalDragon with wings, snout and tail standing on a mountain.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb063edc48672241222044ceeac51f045e13986a_0.webp)
